package service

import (
	"context"
	"fmt"
	"log"
	"net/http"
	"time"

	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

// Positive scenario for service_struct_has_excessive_dependency_count:
// service has too many unrelated dependencies, signaling a god-service.
type AnalyticsService struct {
	db           *gorm.DB
	redisClient  RedisClient
	httpClient   *http.Client
	logger       *log.Logger
	cache        Cache
	validator    Validator
	mailer       Mailer
	eventBus     EventBus
	config       map[string]string
}

type RedisClient interface {
	Get(key string) (string, error)
	Set(key, value string, ttl time.Duration) error
}

type Cache interface {
	Get(ctx context.Context, key string) ([]byte, error)
	Set(ctx context.Context, key string, value []byte, ttl time.Duration) error
}

type Validator interface {
	Validate(data interface{}) error
}

type Mailer interface {
	Send(to, subject, body string) error
}

type EventBus interface {
	Publish(event string, payload interface{}) error
}

func NewAnalyticsService(
	db *gorm.DB,
	redisClient RedisClient,
	httpClient *http.Client,
	logger *log.Logger,
	cache Cache,
	validator Validator,
	mailer Mailer,
	eventBus EventBus,
	config map[string]string,
) *AnalyticsService {
	return &AnalyticsService{
		db:          db,
		redisClient: redisClient,
		httpClient:  httpClient,
		logger:      logger,
		cache:       cache,
		validator:   validator,
		mailer:      mailer,
		eventBus:    eventBus,
		config:      config,
	}
}

func (s *AnalyticsService) GenerateReport(ctx context.Context, reportID string) error {
	s.logger.Printf("generating report %s", reportID)

	if err := s.validator.Validate(map[string]string{"report_id": reportID}); err != nil {
		return err
	}

	cached, _ := s.cache.Get(ctx, "report:"+reportID)
	_ = cached

	s.eventBus.Publish("report.generated", map[string]string{"id": reportID})

	return nil
}

func (s *AnalyticsService) SendNotification(ctx context.Context, userID, message string) error {
	email := s.lookupEmail(ctx, userID)
	if email == "" {
		return fmt.Errorf("no email found for user %s", userID)
	}

	return s.mailer.Send(email, "Analytics Alert", message)
}

func (s *AnalyticsService) lookupEmail(ctx context.Context, userID string) string {
	var email string
	s.db.WithContext(ctx).Raw("SELECT email FROM users WHERE id = ?", userID).Scan(&email)
	return email
}
